Added internal/connectivity service, repair, and routing logic with injected Azure/Tailscale/command seams; go build ./..., go vet ./internal/connectivity/..., and go test ./internal/connectivity/... pass.
Migrated connectivity tests to constructor-injected Azure/Tailscale fakes with fast configs and preserved real-backend notes.

Cut cmd connectivity wrappers over to appContext.conn, removed the old Tailscale/command/timing globals, updated cmd tests to use injected fakes, and verified go test ./internal/connectivity/..., go test ./internal/cmd, go test ./..., plus the deleted-seam grep.
Verified phases 1-3 against origin/dev, checked the moved symbols/strings, ticked verified tasks, and added a follow-up lap for the incomplete connectivity test/doc migration.
Removed the duplicate cmd-side phase-3 connectivity tests/notes, left coverage under internal/connectivity, checked tasks 3.5 and 3.6, and verified go test ./...

Extracted internal/stateutil (ConnectionFromAzure, ZeroConnection, SyncConnection), cut over actions.go call sites, deleted internal/cmd/conv.go; go test ./internal/stateutil/... and ./internal/cmd pass, conv.go gone.
Extracted internal/provision service and default SSH waiter for §5.1-§5.2; preserved TS_AUTHKEY env round-trip and verified go vet ./internal/provision/... plus go build ./....
Added provision tests for TS_AUTHKEY env round-trip, auth resolution, host selection, and verify/lockdown; cut cmd provisioning over to appContext.provision; tests pass.
Verified improve-architecture phases 4-5 against origin/dev and the 318bbf6 baseline, tightened provision tests for exact host-selection/output ordering, and checked off §4-§5 tasks.
Extracted internal/vm lifecycle service and wired it into loadContext while leaving cmd lifecycle wrappers intact; build, vet, and tests are green.
Migrated vm lifecycle, disk, restart, up, cleanup, and azure Info.Running tests onto recording service fakes; go test ./... passes.
Cmd cut over to vm/connectivity/provision services; actions.go removed; build, vet, test, and acceptance grep passed.
Verified improve-architecture phases 6-8 against origin/dev, checked off vm/cmd/test-cleanup tasks, and confirmed build/vet/test plus coverage parity.

Added an Architecture section to README.md as the progressive-disclosure navigation guide for the improve-architecture refactor: thin cmd adapters over vm/provision/connectivity services, provider seams (tailscale.Client, per-package Azure interfaces, CommandRunner/SSHWaiter/PollConfig/ReconnectConfig func seams), shared state sync in internal/stateutil, the loadContext composition root, a 'where does X live?' table, and the file-size budget. Dependency graph verified against shipped imports (acyclic; no service imports cmd; vm reaches connectivity/provision via consumer-side interfaces). Confirmed SPEC.md has no references to the old layout, so §10.2 is a no-op. Did not tick tasks.md (§10.1-10.2 owned by the verify lap).
Verified improve-architecture against origin/dev, fixed lint/doc issues, and checked off tasks 9.1-9.5 plus 10.1-10.2; optional live smoke remains.

Installed the missing local Azure/Tailscale prerequisites and attempted the optional §9.6 smoke, but it remains blocked by absent Azure auth/Rover state and no runnable local Tailscale session in this container.

What I tried: verified the expected Azure/Tailscale credential variable names without printing values; reran `az account show --output json`; reran `tailscale status --json`; confirmed the previous recovery notes and task 9.6 contract. What failed: every expected Azure/Tailscale credential env name is still unset, `az account show` still returns `Please run 'az login'`, and `tailscale status --json` still fails because local `tailscaled` is not running. Current-state finding/suspicion: the promised operator-side credential injection still has not landed in this container runtime, so the live smoke cannot start and task 9.6 must remain unchecked. Changes made: appended another re-confirmation note to `openspec/changes/improve-architecture/live-smoke-recovery.md` and committed it as `3841eff`. Test assertions changed: none.
followups: Inject a real non-interactive Azure login into the container runtime (service principal or federated token, plus subscription selection) and authenticated local Tailscale state or auth material, then rerun improve-architecture task 9.6 (`rover up`, `rover provision`, `rover connect`, `rover command`, `rover restart`, `rover down`) and tick 9.6 only if it passes.
